ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "university_serial_no" INTEGER /* University serial number of the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline of the student */,
  "year_of_passing" INTEGER /* Year of passing of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "cgpa" TEXT /* Cumulative Grade Point Average (CGPA) of the student */,
  "resume_link" TEXT /* Link to the student's resume */,
  "placement_status" TEXT /* Current placement status (e.g., placed, not placed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline (e.g., MBA, MCA, B.Tech) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the discipline program (in years) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the employer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who got placed */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer */,
  "campus_type" TEXT /* Type of campus (on/off campus) */,
  "placement_date" TEXT /* Date of placement */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Offered salary for the placement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the student will be placed */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role offered to the student */,
  "placement_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the placement officer who managed the placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_placement_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("placement_officer_id") REFERENCES placement_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the placement officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the placement officer */,
  "mobile_no" TEXT /* Mobile number of the placement officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the placement officer is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the placement officer's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements_by_discipline" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline */,
  "year_of_passing" INTEGER /* Year of passing */,
  "placement_count" INTEGER /* Number of placements for the discipline in the given year of passing */,
  "average_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary for placements in the discipline */,
  "highest_salary" INTEGER /* Highest salary offered in the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id", "year_of_passing")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements_by_employer" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer */,
  "year_of_passing" INTEGER /* Year of passing */,
  "placement_count" INTEGER /* Number of placements for the employer in the given year of passing */,
  "average_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary for placements by the employer */,
  "highest_salary" INTEGER /* Highest salary offered by the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id", "year_of_passing")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, placement officer, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_logs" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of login */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date of logout */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
